TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ilham Aliyev == ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 12, Ilham Aliyev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Azerbaijan ta' misuw hya' ga Ilham Aliyev, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2003 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ilńßam alije* == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, ilńßam alije*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw azerő≤aijan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ilńßam alije*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Ilham Aliyev == ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 12, Ilham Aliyev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Azerbaijan ta' misuw hya' ga Ilham Aliyev, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2003 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ilńßam alije* == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, ilńßam alije*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw azerő≤aijan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ilńßam alije*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
